monster_masters.name: Monster masters
monster_masters.author: Dariusz J. Mirończuk
monster_masters.description: A pokemon like game. Made with love...

kitten_klicker.name: Kitten klicker
kitten_klicker.author: Dariusz J. Mirończuk
kitten_klicker.description: Klick the kitten to make all the kitty koins!

pack_the_bag.name: Pack the bag
pack_the_bag.author: plasmastarfish
pack_the_bag.description: You're leaving for a trip! Pack all your items into a suitcase. This game is quite short and not particularly difficult, and you can probably complete it in 15 minutes or so.

five_nights_at_pythons.name: Five Nights at Pythons
five_nights_at_pythons.author: Dariusz J. Mirończuk
five_nights_at_pythons.description: Five Nights at Pythons is a point and click horror game, where you have to survive 5 nights in a pizzeria full of python animatronics. The game is quite short, but it has a lot of jump scares, so be prepared!

flappuccino.name: Flappuccino
flappuccino.author: PolyMars
flappuccino.description: You're a coffee-craving bird(?) in Flappuccino, a game made in 48 hours for the Pygame Community New Years Jam!

flyre.name: Flyre
flyre.author: CozyFractal
flyre.description: Flyre is a 2d pixel art shoot-em-up, where you improve through a skill tree! It was made in under one week for the Pygame Community Easter jam, but the development will continue, however at a slower pace.

zelda.name: Zelda
zelda.author: Clear Code
zelda.description: You acctually play as Zelda.. Or a version of her.
